description: ol-duplicate-binder (issue #440): a `reduce` whose destructuring item binder repeats a name (`reduce a [:x :x] in …`) is a pattern-internal duplicate — distinct from the accumulator-vs-pattern collision of #407/F8. Here the accumulator `a` is distinct from the pattern, so the only finding is the repeated `:x`, reported with `form:"destructuring"` at the second `:x` (the same later-occurrence span convention as `for … in`). `:pairs` is declared first so no `ol-undefined-var` fires.
